solution.rawText:
We begin by expanding the brackets and simplifying the powers of x:

                                               2x3 + 10x
                                     f(x) =         3
                                                x4
                                              9      1
                                          = 2x + 10x 4
                                              4



so
                                                5                3
                               f 0 (x) = 2 √Ч 94 x 4 + 10 √Ч 14 xвИТ 4
                                           5            3
                                     = 92 x 4 + 52 xвИТ 4

which is option B.
